Team 1 - arachne core (used to be Jenkin), idk how to build her team but I like her lol. Currently I'm using Tinct for action spam, and Cassiah to retrieve some cards in the ultra slot

Team 3 - corposant core, I focus on deck rotation cuz she benefits from discarding hand cards
Team 4 - counter team, most reliable of my decks
